extraction.one_line_summary: COLBRELLI Sonny won stage 4 bunch sprint in Erfurt after multiple late attacks neutralized, EVENEPOEL Remco held GC by 3 seconds
tactical_patterns: KLUGE Roger's solo chase attempt fractured peloton mid-stage, suggesting teams can use blocking tactics to shed sprinters early
EVENEPOEL Remco's team CCC controlled final kilometer through flamme rouge, proving U23 leaders need dedicated leadout protection
Multiple late attacks (70km, 38km, 10km out) all caught suggests teams overestimated breakaway viability on flat finale

rider_signals.KRISTOFF Alexander: neutral: consistently positioned third in sprint finishes but lacks final 50m acceleration to win
rider_signals.LAMPAERT Yves: positive: second place suggests stronger sprint capability than GC domestique role typically allows
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: held 3-second GC margin through aggressive intermediate sprint defense, showing tactical maturity beyond age
